_comment: Drop-in provider block for opencode.json — apfel (Apple Foundation Model, Neural Engine)
_usage: 1. Install apfel (see setup/apfel.md). 2. Start the server: apfel --serve --port 11435. 3. Merge the 'provider' block below into your opencode.json. 4. Select the model via the OpenCode model picker.
_important: Context window is 4096 tokens TOTAL (input + output combined) — a hard Apple framework limit. Do not use for multi-step agent tasks, long files, or tool-calling loops. Best for short single-turn tasks: grammar fix, commit message, explain a snippet, strict JSON output, rename suggestions. Use port 11435 to avoid conflict with Ollama on 11434.
_requires: macOS 26 (Tahoe), Apple Silicon (M1+), Apple Intelligence enabled (System Settings → Apple Intelligence & Siri)
